# What Does a Bankruptcy Trustee Do?
> Complete guide to bankruptcy trustees. What a Chapter 7 panel trustee and Chapter 13 standing trustee actually do, their powers, and how they...

## About
bankruptcytrustee.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Bankruptcy Asset Liquidation - When the Trustee Sells Your Property: https://bankruptcytrustee.org/asset-liquidation.html
- Chapter 13 Standing Trustee - How They Manage Your Plan: https://bankruptcytrustee.org/chapter-13-trustee.html
- Chapter 7 Bankruptcy Trustee - Powers and Duties: https://bankruptcytrustee.org/chapter-7-trustee.html
- Bankruptcy Trustee FAQ - Frequently Asked Questions: https://bankruptcytrustee.org/faq.html
- What Does a Bankruptcy Trustee Do?: https://bankruptcytrustee.org/
- The Trustee at Your 341 Meeting of Creditors: https://bankruptcytrustee.org/meeting-of-creditors.html
- What Your Subchapter V Trustee Should Be Doing (And What to Do If They Aren't): https://bankruptcytrustee.org/trustee-duties.html
- Bankruptcy Trustee Investigation - What They Look For: https://bankruptcytrustee.org/trustee-investigation.html
- Trustee Objections in Bankruptcy - Exemptions, Discharge, and How to Respond: https://bankruptcytrustee.org/trustee-objections.html
- Bankruptcy Trustee vs Judge - Who Does What?: https://bankruptcytrustee.org/trustee-vs-judge.html
- Privacy Policy: https://bankruptcytrustee.org/privacy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
